dispatchRules.hint: Dispatch rules define the multi-assistant collaboration workflow, injected into the group coordinator to decide task division and order. Ask @group assistant to auto-generate or optimize.
dispatchRules.placeholder: Paste or edit the dispatch rules YAML here; the format is validated on save.
dispatchRules.emptyTip: Ask the @group assistant in chat to auto-generate dispatch rules from the room's assistants, or switch to the YAML view to write them manually.
dispatchRules.parseFailed: The current content cannot be parsed as dispatch rules

chat.workDirEmptyHint: Leave empty to restore default generated directory
chat.deleteGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
chat.clearMessagesConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all messages?
chat.clearMessagesConfirmDesc: Are you sure to clear current messages? Existing messages will be saved to history, and current chat will restart.
chat.stopAllTasksDesc: Will stop {{count}} tasks currently executing in this group. Tasks will be marked as cancelled.

customCommands.title: Custom commands
customCommands.hint: Define your own /commands. Type "/" in the message box and pick one to fill its content into the input.
customCommands.empty: No custom commands yet. Click "Add command" to create one.
customCommands.contentPlaceholder: Text to fill into the input box when this command is selected

chat.scriptRunNeedDesktop: Running scripts requires terminal in desktop client
chat.recordingMaxDuration: Recording reached max duration (2 min), auto stopped
chat.browserNotSupportRecording: Browser doesn't support recording, please type manually
chat.sttModelNotConfigured: Please add speech type (STT/both) model in Model Management first
chat.microphonePermissionRequired: Please allow microphone permission and retry
chat.speechRecognitionError: Speech recognition failed, please retry later
chat.noAgentHintDescSuffix: in the box below and tell it what you need — it'll create and add an assistant for you.

chat.batchDeleteMessagesDesc: Are you sure to delete {{count}} selected messages? They won't appear in future context.
chat.gitCommitMessageRequired: Please enter commit message, e.g.: /git commit fix issue
chat.importTemplateDesc: Select ZIP file, preview compatibility, then create a new group copy.
chat.selectTemplateZipHint: Supports locally exported group templates. Compatibility preview before import.
chat.templateFileSelected: Template file selected. Next step will read template summary from ZIP.
chat.importWillCreateGroup: Import will create a new group. Assistants will use your configured models.
chat.nameConflictHint: Name conflict detected. Will be renamed to: {{name}}
chat.nameOkHint: Name is available for direct import.
chat.screenshotDesc: Export chat history as image. Auto-paged for long content.
chat.pdfEstimateHint: Estimated {{count}} images. Skipped preview to avoid long wait.
chat.quickChatWorkDirPlaceholder: Leave empty for default directory strategy
chat.quickChatWorkDirHint: Selected directory will be work directory for this quick chat. Empty creates separate session directories.
chat.noProviderUseLocalConfig: No provider, use local Agent config
chat.noCompatibleTextModels: No compatible text models. Add providers in model settings.
chat.thinkingModeHint: Only native models (Claude / Codex official) support this. Third-party models (GLM, DeepSeek with Anthropic/OpenAI protocols) may ignore it.
chat.fastModeHint: Roughly 1.5× faster, but token consumption also speeds up
chat.claudeModelHint: Uses local Claude config; leave model empty to use the local default
chat.selectGroupToChat: Select a group to start chatting
chat.workDirectoryPlaceholder: Leave empty for default group directory
chat.workDirectoryHint: All assistants in this group share this working directory
chat.audioPlayFailed: Audio playback failed, please confirm the audio file is still accessible.
chat.roomNotFoundOrDeleted: This chat room does not exist or has been deleted
chat.deleteMessageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone.
chat.deleteRoomConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

roomSettings.defaultAssistantHint: Messages without @mention will trigger this assistant.
roomSettings.triggerModeCoordinatorHint: Smart Collaboration: assistants relay via @ automatically; multi-@ and abnormal handoffs are arbitrated by the system coordinator with parallel dispatch support. Messages without @ go to the default assistant, or the coordinator when none is set.
roomSettings.triggerModeManualHint: Manual Mode: only user @mentions trigger; @ in assistant messages won't relay. Full manual control, best when every step needs review.
roomSettings.rulesHint: Group rules are injected into all assistants' context.
roomSettings.ruleTemplateAntiLoopText: Only I (group owner) can announce discussion end.
roomSettings.ruleTemplateAntiFanoutText: When task done, do not @ anyone, end reply directly.
roomSettings.ruleTemplateUseChineseText: All replies must be in Chinese.
roomSettings.quickChatHint: This is a quick chat, messages go directly to the assistant.
roomSettings.botBindingHint: Bots handle external platform communication. Messages sync to connected bots.
roomSettings.unbindBotConfirm: Are you sure you want to unbind bot "{{name}}"?
roomSettings.noBotBinding: No bots bound. Create a bot in Channels or let External Platform Assistant auto-bind.
roomSettings.deleteChatConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

agentDetail.groupHistoryAccessHint: Inject message index and allow querying group messages
agentDetail.historyAccessSaveFailed: Failed to save group history access settings
agentDetail.confirmClearContextDesc: Are you sure you want to clear the conversation context of assistant "{{name}}" in this group? After clearing, the assistant won't be able to continue previous conversations.

envVars.title: Environment Variables
envVars.label: Environment Variables
envVars.hint: Environment variables are injected into the shell environment for agent script execution in this group. Scripts can access values via $VARIABLE_NAME. Variable names and descriptions are added to agent prompts (values are not).
envVars.keyInvalid: Only letters, numbers, underscores allowed; cannot start with a number
envVars.fixKeyFirst: Please fix environment variable names first
envVars.reservedKeysIgnored: The following reserved keys were ignored: {{keys}}

contextPanel.triggerAssistantHint: Please @ this assistant to start a conversation

historyPanel.triggerAssistantHint: Records will be created after triggering assistant conversation

agentsPanel.createdAndAdded: Assistant created and added to the group
agentsPanel.createdButAddFailed: Assistant created, but failed to add it to the group
agentsPanel.removeConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to remove assistant "{{name}}"? The assistant will no longer participate in this group chat after removal.

cronTasksPanel.noCronTasksHint: No scheduled tasks, click "Create Task" to add
cronTasksPanel.deleteCronTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete task "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

assistant.name: Name

assistant.cropAvatarHint: Only 1:1 avatar cropping supported, drag image to adjust display area
assistant.cropAvatarTip: Recommend using clear frontal avatar. Exported as local crop result, original file path not retained.
assistant.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

assistant.noInstalledSkillsHint: Install Skills to extend assistant capabilities
assistant.voiceProviderLoadFailed: Failed to load voice provider list, please refresh
assistant.voicePreviewText: Hello, I'm {{name}}, this is a preview of the current voice style.
assistant.enableVoiceBroadcastDesc: When enabled, assistant messages can be played manually or automatically.
assistant.broadcastModeDesc: Decide whether assistant responses are played manually or automatically.
assistant.ttsSourceDesc: Choose the voice engine for assistant to read messages.
assistant.browserLocalDesc: Free, no configuration needed, limited voices
assistant.configureVoiceModelFirst: Please configure voice model in Model Management first
assistant.providerDefaultVoiceHint: Leave empty to use provider default voice
assistant.noLocalVoiceHint: Manually input if no local voices detected, leave empty for system default
assistant.previewAndSaveDesc: Auto-saves after changes, preview current effect anytime.
assistant.memoryPlaceholder: No memory content yet, assistant will accumulate during conversations...
assistant.diaryDesc: A nightly diary the assistant writes in its own voice about the day across all groups.
assistant.diaryDisabledHint: The diary feature is off — enable it in System Settings.
assistant.diaryEmpty: This assistant hasn't written any diary yet.
assistant.diaryGenerateEmpty: No chat records for today yet — nothing to write about.
assistant.diaryMemoryAppended: Diary generated, and durable notes were saved to long-term memory.
assistant.memoryDesc: Assistant's long-term memory is stored in local files, can be written by assistant via commands during conversations, effective across all groups.
assistant.quickChatSessionsDesc: Sessions created via quick chat feature
assistant.noSessionsHint: Click 'Quick Chat' button to create a new session
assistant.systemAssistantDetailBlocked: System group assistant does not support detail view
assistant.noCompatibleProviders: No compatible providers — configure a model or log into the local Agent first
assistant.localAgentNotDetected: {{name}} not detected. Please log into the local Agent or pick a model provider
assistant.thinkingModeHint: Only native models (Claude / Codex official) support this setting; third-party models (e.g. GLM, DeepSeek using Anthropic/OpenAI-compatible protocols) may ignore it.
assistant.fastModeHint: Roughly 1.5× faster, but token consumption also speeds up
assistant.claudeModelHint: Uses local Claude config; leave the model empty to use the local default
assistant.imageGenerationHint: When enabled, the assistant can generate images via controlled tools
assistant.noImageModels: No image models available. Please add one in model settings first
assistant.imageProviderRequired: An image model is required when image generation is enabled
assistant.selectFallbackModelsDescription: Choose the models to try in order when a task fails.
assistant.fallbackModelsHint: If the primary model fails, the assistant retries once. If the same error repeats, it switches to backup models in order.
assistant.promptPlaceholderOptional: Define the assistant's behavior and role (optional)
assistant.deleteAssistantDesc: Are you sure you want to delete assistant "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
assistant.deleteCategoryDescAgents: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? {{count}} assistants in this category will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
assistant.deleteCategoryDesc: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

model.requiredFields: Please fill required fields: name, API URL, API Key, model
model.apiKeyMasked: Please enter full API Key, masked key not allowed
model.imageFieldsRequired: Please fill image model provider type and API type
model.jsonParseFailed: JSON parse failed, please check file format
model.invalidImportItem: Item {{index}} is not a valid object
model.missingRequiredFields: Item {{index}} missing required fields (name, API URL, API Key, model)
model.missingImageFields: Item {{index}} is an image model but missing imageProvider or imageApiType
model.deleteProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
model.aiCreateHint: E.g.: Help me configure an OpenAI GPT-4 model
model.missingDefaultProvider: Need to configure a default text model first
model.name: Name
model.sttModelHint: Leave empty to use TTS model for voice input.
model.codexRoutingHint: When enabled, Codex assistants will use Responses protocol to local proxy, which converts to Chat Completions for this provider. Enable when API doesn't support Responses (only /chat/completions).
model.deleteConfirm:
Delete model "{{name}}"?
Linked assistants will lose LLM config.
model.aiParseFailed: Parse failed, please provide more details
model.exportPasswordPlaceholder: Leave empty to export plaintext; fill to encrypt the API Key
model.exportPasswordHint: With a password set, the API Key is encrypted and the same password is required to decrypt on import. Remember it — it cannot be recovered if lost.
model.exportEncryptedNote: The API Key in the exported file will be encrypted.
model.exportPlaintextWarning: Without a password, the exported file contains the full plaintext API Key, and anyone who obtains it can use your key. Keep it safe and never upload or share it with untrusted parties.
model.exportAcknowledge: I understand the exported file contains plaintext keys
model.maskedApiKeyError: The API Key for "{{name}}" is masked. The exported file does not contain the full key — replace it with a real API Key before importing.
model.importPasswordDesc: The API Key in this file is encrypted. Enter the password set during export to decrypt it.
model.decryptFailed: Decryption failed, the password may be incorrect
model.createFirstModel: Create a model to use native assistants
model.audioBaseUrlHint: Enter base URL only, system will auto-append paths:
model.audioOpenaiProtocolHint: Uses OpenAI-compatible protocol (/audio/speech for TTS, /audio/transcriptions for STT).
model.imageBaseUrlHint: Enter base URL only, system will auto-append paths:
model.openrouterModelHint: OpenRouter requires image-output model ID, not regular text models.
model.zhipuModelHint: Zhipu GLM-Image recommends direct image model ID like `glm-image`.
model.xaiSizeHint: Aspect ratio and resolution via semantic request params `aspect_ratio` / `resolution`.
model.apiProtocolHint: Anthropic protocol supports Claude features (thinking, prompt caching), OpenAI protocol is more compatible
model.aiCreateDialogHint: Enter your API config description, AI will auto-parse and fill the form. Examples:
model.aiCreateDialogExample1: "I have a DeepSeek API at https://api.deepseek.com, API Key is sk-xxx, model is deepseek-chat"
model.contextLengthHint: The backend model's real context window (tokens). Claude assistants auto-compact history earlier based on this to avoid overflowing a smaller window and stalling. Effective range 100K–1M, default 1000000 (1M)

skill.noSkillsToInstallHint: All skills are already installed, or skill library is empty
skill.selectedSkillsHint: {{count}} skills selected, click to confirm install
skill.describeSkillPlaceholder: E.g.: Help me find a coding skill, data analysis skill, image processing skill...
skill.chatInstallHint: Click "Start Chat Install" to jump to skill install assistant chat. The assistant will search skill repositories based on your description and help install.
skill.openFolderOnlyInElectron: Open folder is only supported in Electron client
skill.removeSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove skill "{{skillName}}" from agent "{{agentName}}"?
skill.selectFileToView: Select a file to view content
skill.localFolderHint: Folder root must contain SKILL.md, will be copied to shared skill library.
skill.selectFolderOnlyInElectron: Select local folder is only supported in Electron client
skill.pleaseSelectLocalFolder: Please select a local skill folder
skill.copiedToSkillLibrary: Skill copied to shared skill library
skill.symlinkImportHint: Create symbolic link to external skill directory, auto-sync when external skill updates, saves disk space.
skill.copyImportHint: Fully copy skill files to local, independent management, not affected by external updates.

settings.brandEnterpriseDesc: Stable and clear, suitable for team collaboration
settings.brandGraphiteDesc: Neutral and restrained, suitable for formal office use
settings.brandVioletDesc: Markdown-like purple, suitable for technical interfaces
settings.brandEmeraldDesc: Professional and calm, suitable for operations teams
settings.terminalAppLabel: Use this app when opening work directory
settings.terminalHint: This app will be used when selecting "Terminal" in the group work directory menu.
settings.messageSoundHint: Play sound when receiving assistant reply
settings.diaryFeatureDesc: When on, every active assistant writes a nightly diary in its own voice and distills durable notes into long-term memory, making your assistants smarter the more you use them.
settings.diaryEnableConfirmDesc: After this is enabled, the system writes nightly diaries for active assistants and may distill durable notes into long-term memory. This can consume a lot of tokens. Please confirm before enabling it.
settings.notificationMacHint: Please confirm "Allow Notifications" is enabled and set alert style to "Banner".
settings.notificationWinPath: System Settings path: System → Notifications → TeamAgentX.
settings.notificationWinHint: Please confirm notifications, banners, and notification center are all enabled.
settings.notificationSettingsFailed: Failed to open system notification settings
settings.notificationSettingsNotSupported: Current platform doesn't support opening notification settings directly. Please manually enable in system settings.
settings.gitBranchDisplayHint: Show and switch Git branch above chat input
settings.mobileConnectHint: Scan QR code with TeamAgentX App or other QR scanner to auto-login and connect
settings.serverAddressHint: Default is local network address, can be changed
settings.scanToConnectHint: Scan the QR code below with TeamAgentX App or other QR scanner
settings.securityAlertHint: The QR code contains your login credentials. Do not share it with others. If obtained by others, they can directly connect to your service and access your data.
settings.sdkInstallSuccess: SDK installed successfully; assistants will use the SDK when no host CLI is detected
settings.sdkInstallFailed: SDK installation failed, please check installation log
settings.acpToolsHint: When a host CLI is detected, Claude/Codex assistants prefer the host CLI, matching how it runs in your terminal. If no CLI is detected, they fall back to the app-local SDK.
settings.openAtLoginHint: Auto-start TeamAgentX when logging into system
settings.openAtLoginNotSupported: Current system doesn't support setting open at login within the client.
settings.openAtLoginSupportOnlyDesktop: Only desktop client supports open at login
settings.debugLogHint: Off by default. When enabled, the desktop client continues writing electron-debug.log for startup, update, and runtime troubleshooting.
settings.debugLogSaveFailed: Failed to save debug log setting
settings.debugLogSupportOnlyDesktop: Only desktop client supports debug log settings
settings.updateAvailableHint: New version {{version}} found and shown in the sidebar
settings.updateSupportOnlyDesktop: Only desktop client supports checking updates
settings.installingPleaseWait: Installing update, please don't close, app will restart automatically...
settings.downloadFailedNetwork: Download failed, please check network and retry
settings.websiteAndDocsHint: View website intro, download links, and latest docs. Docs are organized by current client features, suitable for new members and team sharing.
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

setup.modelConfigDescription: Set up your AI model provider
setup.completeDescription: You can start using TeamAgentX now
setup.confirmBackend: Please confirm backend service is running

setup.noToolsInstalledHint: No AI tools detected. Click 'Install' to download and install.
setup.configDefaultModelHint: Configure API model for selected engine. You can also skip and configure later in settings.
setup.willUseLocalApiKey: Will use API Key from local auth.json
setup.claudeConfigHint: Will use local Claude config; leave model empty to use local default
setup.detectToolsFailed: Failed to detect tools, please confirm backend is running

office.title: 3D Office
office.noRecord: No execution record for this message
office.socketDisconnected: Socket disconnected, agent status may not be up-to-date

integration.botListHint: {{count}} bot instances on this platform. Shows room bindings, status, and actions.
integration.noBotsHint: No bot instances on this platform. Create one to see it listed here.
integration.botInstanceBindingRule1: One bot instance can bind to one room at most
integration.botInstanceBindingRule2: One room can bind multiple platform bots
integration.botInstanceBindingRule3: All session messages received by bot will enter bound room
integration.deleteBotConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bot?
integration.notConfigured: Not configured (required for WeCom / QQ / Telegram Webhook)
integration.discardChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
integration.webhookNotNeeded: Current platform doesn't need webhook, or public URL not configured
integration.linkedRoomsHint: Only shows rooms with external bots connected.
integration.noContentPreview: No preview content available for this sync.
integration.editBotHint: Modify config and save. Secret fields left empty keep original values.

integration.rebindHint: This bot is bound to "{{from}}". Confirm to unbind and rebind to "{{to}}".
integration.deleteBotConfirmWithName: Delete "{{name}}"? You'll need to re-enter credentials.

cron.deleteTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
cron.cronFormatHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday (e.g. "0 9 * * *" means 9:00 daily)
cron.executionContentPlaceholder: Message content; select assistant below to trigger
cron.executionContentHint: Tip: Do not write @assistant name manually, the system handles it based on selection below
cron.triggerAssistantHint: Select assistants to trigger; multi-select or all-assistants sends messages sequentially
cron.noAssistantsHint: No assistants in this chat room, please add first
cron.taskPromptPlaceholder: Define prompt content for scheduled execution

execution.sameErrorRepeated: The same error repeated, switching to the next backup model.
execution.noFallbackModelLeft: The same error repeated, but there are no more backup models.
execution.errorChanged: The second error changed, so fallback stops and the task is marked failed.
execution.handoffAuditDesc: No handoff was registered this turn, so the assistant ran one final handoff check: register handoffs if another assistant must continue, otherwise confirm the task is complete.
execution.handoffAuditNone: Audited · task judged complete, no handoff needed

taskQueue.title: Task Queue
taskQueue.taskQueueHint: Task queue executes in order, currently executing the first pending task

app.passwordChangedDescription: Please log in again with your new password
app.desktopNotificationReady: Ready to receive new message notifications.
app.runtimePreparingProgress: First launch or upgrade — preparing runtime…
app.runtimeExtractDetail: First launch needs to unpack the runtime, usually only a few seconds — please wait.
app.runtimeCopyDetail: First launch needs to copy the runtime (about 1 minute) — please keep the app open.
